name.ja: <ruby>湧<rt>ゆう</rt></ruby><ruby>軍<rt>ぐん</rt></ruby><ruby>機<rt>き</rt></ruby><ruby>蒼<rt>ソー</rt></ruby><ruby>炎<rt>エン</rt></ruby>

summoning_condition.en: You can Special Summon this card from your hand face-up to your field by revealing 1 non-Level 5 FIRE Attribute Machine Type monster in your hand.

requirement.en: Send the top card of your Deck to the Graveyard.

effect.en: Choose up to 3 face-up Level 2 or higher FIRE Attribute Machine Type monsters on your field. This turn, those monsters gain 500 ATK, their Levels are reduced by 1, and they inflict piercing battle damage.
